screen.archetypes.picker.prompt: This choice is permanent. Pick who you'll become.
archetype.archetypes.strength.blurb: Melee, face to face. Start by punching zombies; end as something they run from.
archetype.archetypes.agility.blurb: Strike from the shadows, or from range. Start a thief; end inescapable.
archetype.archetypes.intellect.blurb: Cast. Start with a spark that barely singes; end calling down meteors.
screen.archetypes.confirm.title: Become a %s?
screen.archetypes.confirm.body: You will start as a %s and can grow into a %s. This choice cannot be undone yet.
screen.archetypes.tree.title: %s Skill Tree
screen.archetypes.tree.reset.tooltip: Creative only. Clears your choice so you can pick again.
screen.archetypes.tree.mastered: Full potential unlocked — you are now a true %s.
node.archetypes.crusher.adrenaline.desc: Landing a mace or fist hit grants attack speed for 3 seconds — 5%/10% for the mace, doubled for bare fists.
node.archetypes.crusher.sunder.desc: Your blows part armor like Breach: level I/II with the mace, II/IV with bare fists. Stacks with the enchantment.
node.archetypes.crusher.bare_knuckle.des: Unarmed damage up per rank — four ranks take your fists to an iron sword's pace.
node.archetypes.crusher.iron_skin.desc: While your hands are bare: +1 armor and +1 toughness per rank. Skin like plate.
node.archetypes.crusher.haymaker.desc: Capstone (ability key with bare fists): one enormous punch — 4x your attack damage, a stunning daze, and a Knockback II send-off. 20s cooldown, only spent if it lands.
node.archetypes.crusher.meteor.desc: Density by another name: mace smashes deal bonus damage per fallen block, per rank. Stacks with the enchantment.
node.archetypes.crusher.shockwave.desc: A falling mace blow rings outward — its full damage hits everything within 2/4 blocks of your target.
node.archetypes.crusher.earth_shatter.de: A Quake that meets no creature vents into the ground: 33%/66%/100% of the cooldown refunded, and every block up to stone hardness within 2/4/6 blocks shatters — one mace durability apiece.
node.archetypes.crusher.quake.desc: Capstone (ability key with a mace): plant your feet — immovable — and raise the mace for 1.5 seconds, then slam: 1.5x attack damage plus a bonus per Density level and Meteor rank, and hostiles go skyward. 30s cooldown.
node.archetypes.crusher.battle_trance.de: Every mace or fist hit banks temporary health — half a heart per hit, doubled for bare fists — up to one heart per rank. Fades when the fight does.
node.archetypes.verdict.not_connected: Locked — connect it to a node you own
node.archetypes.verdict.tree_full: This tree is at its 15-point cap
node.archetypes.verdict.exclusive_taken: Locked — you chose the other capstone
node.archetypes.protector.bash.desc: Active (default G): shove the nearest enemy in front of you for 5 damage. Needs a shield in either hand. 6s cooldown.
node.archetypes.protector.slam.desc: The bash hits a third harder per rank — and its cooldown grows to match. 13s at full rank; Quick Recovery brings it back down.
node.archetypes.protector.cooldown.desc: Each rank removes a fifth of the bash's 6-second cooldown.
node.archetypes.protector.knockback.desc: The bash trades 12% damage per rank for a much stronger shove.
node.archetypes.protector.wide.desc: The bash hits everyone in front of you — extra targets take half damage, then full damage at rank 2. Each rank also widens Ground Slam by a block.
node.archetypes.protector.unbreaking.des: Shields you block with take half durability damage, like built-in Unbreaking.
node.archetypes.protector.spikes.desc: Melee attackers hitting your raised shield are spiked — Thorns V, X, then XV by rank.
node.archetypes.protector.rush.desc: Hold block and press sprint to lunge forward — 2 blocks, +2 per rank, 6 at max. Short cooldown.
node.archetypes.protector.reflect.desc: Projectiles you block fly back at their shooter for half their damage.
node.archetypes.protector.omni_block.des: Capstone: your raised shield blocks attacks from every direction, wreathed in a visible aura. Locks out Ground Slam.
node.archetypes.protector.ground_slam.de: Capstone: the bash becomes a ground slam, hitting everything within 2 blocks at full damage. Wide Swings adds a block per rank. Locks out Bulwark.
node.archetypes.protector.braced.desc: Every hit your shield blocks shaves a second off the bash's cooldown.
node.archetypes.protector.taunt.desc: The bash is also a challenge: every monster within 8 blocks turns to attack you.
node.archetypes.slayer.slowness.desc: Sword and greatsword hits slow the target for 3 seconds — Slowness I, then II.
node.archetypes.slayer.taste_of_blood.de: Kills with sword or greatsword restore half a heart per rank.
node.archetypes.slayer.lunge.desc: Sword swings fling you a step where you look — one block per rank, once every 2 seconds. Works upward.
node.archetypes.slayer.blade_dance.desc: Every manual sword strike has a 25% chance to lash out at another enemy near you — any direction, the back included. Bladestorm doesn't count.
node.archetypes.slayer.kbres.desc: While a greatsword is in hand: 30/60% knockback resistance.
node.archetypes.slayer.bleed.desc: Sword hits open a wound: half a heart per rank, every second, for 3 seconds.
node.archetypes.slayer.heavy.desc: The greatsword hits 10% harder per rank — and swings slower by the same.
node.archetypes.slayer.firstblood.desc: Greatsword hits against unhurt targets deal +40%. The opener.
node.archetypes.slayer.flurry.desc: Sword kills reset Lunge on the spot.
node.archetypes.slayer.executioner.desc: Greatsword blows finish any target below 15% health outright.
node.archetypes.slayer.bloodlust.desc: Any melee kill grants 3 seconds of Speed.
node.archetypes.slayer.bladestorm.desc: Capstone (ability key with a sword): whirl for 3 seconds, striking everything nearby six times at half damage. 45s cooldown. Locks out Decimate.
node.archetypes.slayer.decimate.desc: Capstone (ability key with a greatsword): one massive tilted cleave — double damage to everything in front, sweeping torches, grass and other fragile clutter from its path. 30s cooldown. Locks out Bladestorm.
node.archetypes.slayer.relentless.desc: Your capstone comes back 15 seconds sooner — Decimate in 15, Bladestorm in 30.
node.archetypes.marksman.true_shot.desc: Your next bow/crossbow shot is unaffected by gravity and deals x2.0 damage. 20 seconds cooldown.
node.archetypes.marksman.seeker_arrow.de: True Shot now automatically shoots at nearby hostile target, passing through neutral. True Shot damage bonus removed, cooldown reduced by 10 seconds.
node.archetypes.marksman.snap_shot.desc: True Shot damage bonus increased to x4.0 and shoots an arrow immediately on use.
node.archetypes.assassin.shadow_step.des: Teleport behind the target creature up to 16 blocks away and strike it once with your dagger. Cooldown 15s.
node.archetypes.assassin.shadow_flurry.d: Shadow Step's strikes for x3.0 damage, cooldown increased to 30s.
node.archetypes.shadow.predator.desc: Kills while invisible renew the invisibility duration.
node.archetypes.shadow.last_shadow.desc: Fatal damage instead cleanses the negative effects, grants 2 seconds of immunity and casts Invisibility. Both then share a 180s cooldown.
node.archetypes.elementalist.fireball.de: 50 mana, wand in hand. Hurl a fireball that deals 2.5 hearts and sets the target ablaze. Cannot be deflected. Choosing fire locks away ice.
node.archetypes.elementalist.meteorite.d: Fireball becomes a meteor: your whole mana pool (100 minimum) calls it down 16 blocks above the targeted spot. More mana, bigger crater — and your cost reducers refund their share after the blast. Needs open sky above the target.
node.archetypes.elementalist.flamethrowe: Fireball becomes a channel: hold the key to spray fire — 50 mana to ignite, 25 per second held.
node.archetypes.wizard.magic_missile.des: Loose a missile that flies a short distance and deals 3 hearts of damage. Consumes 25 mana. Wand in hand.
node.archetypes.wizard.seeker_missile.de: Missiles steer toward the nearest enemy, but flight speed is reduced.
node.archetypes.wizard.lance.desc: Missiles pierce every enemy they pass and strike a wider path.
node.archetypes.priest.holy_light.desc: 50 mana, wand in hand. Lob a burst of light that shatters on impact: 2.5 hearts healed to the living, the same dealt to the undead.
node.archetypes.priest.renewal.desc: Holy Light also grants Regeneration for 10 seconds to non-hostiles.
node.archetypes.priest.benediction.desc: Holy Light also grants a random blessing for 10 seconds to non-hostiles: Speed, Strength, Resistance or Fire Resistance.
item.archetypes.spellcasting_tome.no_spe: Needs the Specialities mod to level Spellcasting
node.archetypes.marksman.conservation.de: Arrows have a 12.5/25/37.5/50% chance to not be consumed.
node.archetypes.marksman.pinning.desc: Arrow hits apply Slowness I/II for 3 seconds.
node.archetypes.marksman.nimble_draw.des: Reduce penalty for holding the bow drawn by 33/66/100%.
node.archetypes.marksman.rapid_reload.de: Kills with crossbow makes the next reload time 25/50/75/100% shorter.
node.archetypes.marksman.combustion.desc: Hitting a burning target detonates it: everything within 3 blocks takes the arrow's full damage.
node.archetypes.marksman.focus.desc: Reduces True Shot cooldown by 10 seconds on each successful hit on any creature.
node.archetypes.marksman.acrobatics.desc: While drawing a bow, press sprint to roll 2/4 blocks forward. 8s cooldown.
node.archetypes.marksman.piercing_tips.d: Bow and crossbow shots ignore 2 points of the target's armor.
node.archetypes.shadow.umbral_sight.desc: Hostiles within 8/16 blocks are highlighted while sneaking.
node.archetypes.shadow.swift_shadow.desc: Speed penalty for sneaking is reduced by 50/100%.
node.archetypes.shadow.dark_mending.desc: Regenerate a heart every 8/6/4/2 seconds while invisible.
node.archetypes.shadow.dim_presence.desc: Reduce the range hostiles can see you while sneaking by 20/40%.
node.archetypes.shadow.cleansing_veil.de: Casting Invisibility cleanses the negative effects.
node.archetypes.shadow.first_strike.desc: Melee attacks from invisibility deal +25/50% bonus damage.
node.archetypes.shadow.bloodrush.desc: Kills while invisible grant Strength I/II for 4 seconds.
node.archetypes.shadow.ghost_armor.desc: Your armor turns invisible with you.
node.archetypes.shadow.night_stalker.des: While invisible at night, you have increased manoeuvrability.
node.archetypes.assassin.lightfoot.desc: Holding a dagger increases movement speed by 10/20%.
node.archetypes.assassin.sidestep.desc: Chance to dodge an attack while holding a dagger: 7/14/21%.
node.archetypes.assassin.crippling_poiso: Dagger hits apply Slowness I/II for 4 seconds.
node.archetypes.assassin.expose.desc: Dagger damage dealt to targets below half health increased by: 10/20/30%.
node.archetypes.assassin.venom.desc: Dagger hits apply Poison I/II for 4 seconds.
node.archetypes.assassin.blight.desc: Dagger hits apply Wither I/II for 3 seconds.
node.archetypes.assassin.twin_fangs.desc: Shadow Step will also hit with the dagger held in off-hand at x0.5 efficiency.
node.archetypes.elementalist.ice_blast.d: 50 mana, wand in hand. Hurl a freezing bolt: 2 hearts and Slowness III for 4 seconds. Choosing ice locks away fire.
node.archetypes.elementalist.focused_min: +0.5 mana regeneration per second, per rank.
node.archetypes.elementalist.kindling.de: Fire spells cost 5 less mana per rank.
node.archetypes.elementalist.scorch.desc: Fireballs hit a heart harder per rank; the flamethrower's tongues gain half of that.
node.archetypes.elementalist.ignition.de: Your fire burns 3 seconds longer per rank.
node.archetypes.elementalist.vaporize.de: Fire projectiles boil away the water they pass over.
node.archetypes.elementalist.chill.desc: Ice spells cost 5 less mana per rank.
node.archetypes.elementalist.frostbite.d: Ice Blast slows one level harder and one second longer per rank.
node.archetypes.elementalist.shatter.des: Slowed or freezing targets take +15% per rank from all your spells.
Ice projectiles glaze the water they pass into walkable frost.
node.archetypes.elementalist.glacial_spi: Ice Blast becomes a lance of winter: 2.5x damage, and the target freezes where it stands.
node.archetypes.elementalist.blizzard.de: Ice Blast becomes a called storm: icicles rake the targeted 5x5 ground for 10 hearts over 8 seconds. Recasting moves the storm. 75 mana.
node.archetypes.elementalist.spellweaver: All your spells cost 10% less mana.
node.archetypes.elementalist.arcane_powe: All your spells deal 20% more damage.
node.archetypes.wizard.mana_shield.desc: While a wand is in hand, 50% of damage taken drains mana instead of health (2 mana per point of damage).
node.archetypes.wizard.force.desc: +half a heart of missile damage per rank.
node.archetypes.wizard.overwhelm.desc: +20% missile damage against anything already wounded.
node.archetypes.wizard.concussion.desc: Missiles apply Weakness I for 3 seconds.
node.archetypes.wizard.shatterpoint.desc: +30% missile damage against targets at full health.
node.archetypes.wizard.mind_well.desc: Every 8th, then every 4th, missile leaves empowered — +1.5 hearts of damage.
node.archetypes.wizard.flow.desc: +0.5 mana regeneration per second, per rank.
node.archetypes.priest.lumen.desc: Holy Light heals and smites half a heart harder per rank.
node.archetypes.priest.fervent_cast.desc: Holy light flies faster and farther.
node.archetypes.priest.mercy.desc: Holy light healing improved by +1/2 hearts.
node.archetypes.priest.wrath.desc: Holy light deals +1/2 heart of damage to undead.
node.archetypes.priest.immolation.desc: Holy light sets undead enemies on fire for 3/6 seconds.
node.archetypes.priest.aegis.desc: Casting Holy Light shells you with 1/2 hearts of absorption.
node.archetypes.priest.sanctuary.desc: Casting Holy Light shells friendly targets with 1/2 hearts of absorption.
node.archetypes.priest.judgement.desc: Holy light applies Weakness I/II to undead enemies for 6 seconds.
node.archetypes.priest.ascendant.desc: Holy Light's healing and smiting are 25% stronger.
item.archetypes.blaze_wand.tooltip: Fire spells cost 15 less mana and deal x1.5 damage
item.archetypes.breeze_wand.tooltip: Frost spells cost 15 less mana and deal x1.5 damage
item.archetypes.holy_wand.tooltip: Priest spells cost 15 less mana and heal x1.5 stronger
